testcase.name: User purchases Samsung Galaxy S6 successfully
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the Demoblaze website...................................passed Then the page title should be "STORE".......................................passed When I login with username "Prabhu123" and password "Jackman"...............passed Then I should see the welcome message "Welcome Prabhu123"...................passed When I select the product "Samsung galaxy s6"...............................passed Then I should see the product details page for "Samsung galaxy s6"..........passed When I add the product to the cart..........................................passed And I proceed to checkout...................................................passed Then the "Place order" dialog should be displayed...........................passed When I enter the order details:.............................................passed And I confirm the purchase..................................................passed Then I should see the message "Thank you for your purchase!"................passed And I close the confirmation................................................passed

testcase.name: Login with valid username and password
testcase.system-out: Given I navigate to the Demoblaze webapp....................................passed When I click on the login link..............................................passed And I enter username "Prabhu123"............................................passed And I enter password "Jackman"..............................................passed And I click on the login button.............................................passed Then I should see the logout link...........................................passed
